steps.title: Identify the noun being modified
steps.content: The blank precedes "important place" — a singular noun. The demonstrative must match that number.

steps.title: Apply demonstrative adjective agreement
steps.content:
Rule: demonstrative adjectives must agree in number with the noun they modify. "Place" is singular.
  • Choice A — ‘this’: singular demonstrative — agrees with the singular "place". ✓
  • Choice B — ‘both’: indicates two of something; cannot modify a single noun. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘those’: plural demonstrative — does not agree with singular "place". ✗
  • Choice D — ‘these’: plural demonstrative — does not agree with singular "place". ✗
That confirms A is correct.
